name: Polar Analytics Ecommerce Data Platform API
what_it_does: Ecommerce data aggregation and analytics platform with API — unifying data from Shopify, ad platforms (Meta, Google, TikTok), email (Klaviyo), and other sources into a single analytics layer with pre-built KPI dashboards, custom report builder, and data warehouse sync for DTC brands.
use_cases: Querying unified ecommerce KPIs (revenue, ROAS, CAC, LTV) from single data source
Pulling cross-channel marketing performance data for DTC brand dashboards
Syncing Polar's unified data to BigQuery or Redshift for custom analytics
Automating daily KPI reports for DTC brand leadership via API
Integrating Polar attribution data with BI tools for investor reporting
not_for: B2B SaaS revenue analytics (Polar is ecommerce-focused)
Complex SQL analytics requiring data warehouse (use BigQuery directly)
best_when: A DTC ecommerce brand wants a unified data layer across all their marketing and commerce tools (Shopify, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Klaviyo) with pre-built dashboards and data warehouse sync without building a custom data stack.
avoid_when: You need deep custom analytics beyond pre-built KPIs, run on platforms other than Shopify, or already have a mature data warehouse infrastructure.

auth.notes: API key from Polar account settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. No webhooks. Shopify OAuth and ad platform OAuth configured in Polar admin. Data sync to BigQuery/Redshift via Polar's connector — not directly API-accessible.

pricing.notes: French company (Paris). Founded 2020. Raised $18M Series A (2022). Backed by Point Nine Capital. Unified data platform differentiator — single source of truth across all DTC tools. No-code data pipeline for non-technical ecommerce operators. Data warehouse sync for analysts. Popular with European DTC Shopify brands.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for unified KPIs, channel performance, and attribution data. Bearer token auth. Good API documentation. All data integrations configured in Polar admin — API reads pre-aggregated metrics. Data refresh latency varies by source (ad platforms 1-6 hours, Shopify near real-time).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All analytics reads are fully idempotent. KPI reads idempotent by date range. Channel reads idempotent. Attribution reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Shopify OAuth + all ad platform OAuth configured separately in admin
Data refresh latency: ad platforms 1-6 hours behind — not real-time
API provides pre-aggregated metrics — raw event data not accessible via API
Data warehouse sync is Polar-managed connector — not custom pipeline
Pricing per store + revenue tier can scale significantly for high-GMV brands

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. Bearer token auth. Revenue and customer data in unified platform is sensitive — restrict API access. Ad platform OAuth tokens for all channels require secure storage. French company with GDPR-first design.
